steps.title: Expand both sides
steps.content:
For infinitely many solutions, both sides must simplify to the same expression.
$$18(x+6)=18x+108$$
$$2(x+c)+16x=18x+2c$$

steps.title: Match the constants
steps.content:
The $x$ terms already match, so set the constants equal.
$$108=2c$$
$$c=54$$

steps.title: Match the value
steps.content: The value $54$ makes both sides equal to $18x+108$, which matches choice B. The answer is B.
